description:
Never miss go-time again. Deadlinely shows how many days and hours you have left for every exam, assignment, and due date—so you always know what needs attention next.

COUNT DOWN IN DAYS AND HOURS
• Add finals, exams, capstone projects, and personal deadlines
• See live countdowns with clear urgency colors
• Mark deadlines done when you finish

WIDGETS ON HOME AND LOCK SCREEN
• Glance at your next deadline without opening the app
• Home Screen small and medium widgets
• Lock Screen rectangular, circular, and inline widgets

SMART REMINDERS
• Notification one day before
• Morning-of alert on the due date

DEADLINELY PRO
• Unlimited deadlines
• Full widget access
• Reminders included

Built for students and anyone juggling school, work, and real life. Download Deadlinely and keep every deadline in view.

Terms of Use: https://deadlinely.gatex.uk/terms.html
Privacy Policy: https://deadlinely.gatex.uk/privacy.html
promotionalText: See days and hours left on your Lock Screen. Add exams and due dates, get reminders, and stay ahead of crunch time.
